work.title: Photobooth Kiosk App
work.description: Real-time photobooth kiosk built for live events — configurable client branding, instant photo delivery, and a client-facing UI running on local hardware. Increased event engagement by 25%. Part of the product that won the CGW Silver Edge Award at SIGGRAPH 2023.

work.title: NHG E-Commerce Site
work.description: Built a haircare brand's first web presence end-to-end — storefront, product pages, and automated lead capture via Google Sheets API that eliminated manual data entry. Delivered to client as a complete, production-ready package.
work.tech: PHP, JavaScript, Google Sheets API, PostgreSQL

work.title: Event Integration Backend
work.description: Backend API powering a queer event discovery app. Integrated Eventbrite for live event ingestion, built REST endpoints for the frontend team, and containerized the full dev environment with Docker.

work.title: Cloud Stable Diffusion Infrastructure
work.description: Deployed Stable Diffusion to AWS with horizontal auto-scaling — automated spin-up and teardown of EC2 instances based on demand. Built the cloud infrastructure behind Davant Systems' SIGGRAPH 2023 award-winning Stable Diffusion interface.
work.tech: Python, AWS EC2, Auto Scaling, Stable Diffusion

personal.title: Sloomoo: AI Holiday Wish Experience
personal.description: Full-stack GenAI web app built for a live holiday event at Sloomoo Institute. Users submit a wish and receive a custom AI-generated poem and unique image in real time. Built the Express API, Socket.IO live streaming layer, ComfyUI integration for image generation, and AWS S3 pipeline for output delivery.
personal.tech: React, Node.js, Socket.IO, AWS S3, ComfyUI, DeepSeek API

personal.title: Admin Dashboard
personal.description: Client-facing internal tool with Supabase Auth, role-based access, and UI management for content and user administration.

personal.title: E-Commerce Store
personal.description: Full-stack store with FastAPI backend and React TypeScript frontend. Features cart, Stripe checkout, product filtering, and dynamic detail views.
personal.tech: React (Vite), TypeScript, FastAPI, Stripe, Tailwind CSS

personal.title: Nutrition Tracker
personal.description: Real-time nutrition tracker with food search, serving size selection, and daily intake logging. Pulls data from the FatSecret API.
personal.tech: React (Vite), TypeScript, FatSecret API, Express.js, Node.js

personal.title: $650 Enterprise NAS: 16TB RAIDZ2 Build Pushing 400MB/s on a Budget
personal.description: Built a $650, 16TB RAIDZ2 TrueNAS system with enterprise SAS drives delivering ~400MB/s sustained throughput, multi-stream ingest, and scalable homelab performance well above its price point.
personal.tech: Repurposed $100 PC running TrueNAS (ZFS RAIDZ2) • 8× HGST Ultrastar SAS (HUS723020ALS640) • LSI SAS HBA (IT mode) • USB 3.1 Gen 2 (10Gbps) UGREEN adapters • ~400MB/s sustained multi-stream throughput

personal.title: Shared LLM Hub on Raspberry Pi
personal.description: Self-hosted full-stack app wrapping LLM APIs in a simple GUI. Runs on a Raspberry Pi with Cloudflare Tunnel and Zero Trust for secure, pay-per-use access instead of monthly subscriptions.
personal.tech: Raspberry Pi 5, React, Node.js, Express, LLM APIs, Cloudflare Tunnel, Zero Trust, Linux
